targets.rawSql: SELECT NOW() AS time, ROUND(SUM(energy_kwh) * 0.454, 2) AS value FROM meter_readings WHERE date_trunc('month', time) = date_trunc('month', NOW())
SELECT NOW() AS time, ROUND(SUM(energy_kwh), 0) AS value FROM meter_readings WHERE date_trunc('month', time) = date_trunc('month', NOW())
SELECT NOW() AS time, ROUND(SUM(energy_kwh) * 0.585, 0) AS value FROM meter_readings WHERE date_trunc('month', time) = date_trunc('month', NOW())

SELECT zone_name AS "Zone", ROUND(SUM(energy_kwh), 0) AS "kWh", ROUND(SUM(energy_kwh) * 0.454, 2) AS "Cost (RM)", ROUND(SUM(energy_kwh) * 0.585, 0) AS "CO₂ (kg)", ROUND(100.0 * SUM(energy_kwh) / SUM(SUM(energy_kwh)) OVER (), 1) AS "% of Total" FROM meter_readings WHERE date_trunc('month', time) = date_trunc('month', NOW()) GROUP BY zone_name ORDER BY 3 DESC

panels.title: Monthly Energy Cost Trend (RM)
panels.description: 3 months of seeded historical data + current month

targets.rawSql: SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month', time), 'Mon YYYY') AS month, ROUND(SUM(energy_kwh) * 0.454, 0) AS cost_rm FROM meter_readings GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY MIN(time)
